response: Upstairs, the editor must determine the number of puzzles in each section. The first section has 12 puzzles. The second section has twice as many as the first, so 24 puzzles. The third section has 5 more than the second, so 29 puzzles. * * * The total number of puzzles is 12 + 24 + 29. The entire book will contain 65 puzzles. Any other questions?
